description_long: This is an upright piano with a matching bench, both constructed from dark wood with a subtle grain texture. The piano features a full keyboard with alternating white and black keys, and a recessed area above the keys that may serve as a music rest. The front panel is flat and unadorned, while the sides and top display a consistent wood grain pattern. Two metallic pedals are visible beneath the keyboard, indicating standard piano functionality. The bench is rectangular with four straight legs and a textured seat, matching the piano's finish.
description: A dark wood upright piano with a matching bench, featuring a full keyboard and two metallic pedals.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full keyboard, two pedals, and the matching bench positioned in front.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the piano, the bench's rectangular shape, and the visible pedals beneath the keyboard.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the flat, unadorned back panel with a consistent wood grain texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view similar to view 1, showing the piano's depth, bench, and pedal placement.
attribute_keyboard_layout: Standard keyboard with approximately 52 white keys and 36 black keys in alternating groups, arranged in a traditional piano layout.
